prose: The Fukui reactivity calculation on ferrocene using the GFN2-xTB method in the gas phase was completed successfully. The primary Fukui index report value is approximately 0.22903, with full details stored in the output and logs. The method used was GFN2-xTB (semi-empirical tight-binding) in the xtb program, in the gas phase, with charge 0 and multiplicity 1.
